title: Language Change - Earbuds/Headsets and smart Charge Chase/Stand are out of date
scenario: Verify that changing device language on a multi-component device with outdated firmware completes successfully, updating all components to the latest firmware and applying the language change to the smart charge case.
steps: Ensure the device (Earbuds with Charge Case or Headset with Charge Stand) has multiple components all on outdated firmware.
Initiate the DFU (Device Firmware Update) process.
Wait for the language change and DFU process to complete.
Verify that all components have been updated to the latest firmware version.
Check that the language on the smart charge case (Free 60+) has changed accordingly.
expected: The language change and DFU process complete successfully. All components are updated to the latest firmware version, and the language on the smart charge case (Free 60+) changes accordingly.
